title: Amazon Books India Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Books India Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Amazon Books India Holdings Services in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Amazon Books India Holdings Services:
Amazon Books India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India Holdings Services!
